name: Garlic Beans Three Ways
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Fresh green beans (diagonally cut or whole)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and prepare the beans. Place them in a saucepan of boiling water and cook for 4 to 6 minutes, until tender-crisp.
2. Drain the beans using a sieve.
3. Return the pan to low heat and add butter. Melt the butter.
4. Add garlic; then add the beans. Toss everything together.
5. Serves: 4
To Prepare ahead of time:
1. After boiling, drain the beans and quickly cool them under cold water.
2. Drain again and pat dry the beans.
3. At serving time, melt butter in a frying pan.
4. Add garlic, then add the beans and cook only until the beans are hot.
5. Optionally, add 4 slices of crisply cooked bacon crumbled or 1/4 cup toasted pine nuts.
